name: Get User Defined Field Names for All OpCos

content.query:
SELECT 'FHI' as OpCo, * FROM [ODS].[LP_FHI_ufn_UserFieldNames]
UNION
SELECT 'PHI' as OpCo, * FROM [ODS].[LP_PHI_ufn_UserFieldNames]
UNION
SELECT 'HSI' as OpCo, * FROM [ODS].[LP_HSI_ufn_UserFieldNames]
UNION
SELECT 'MAC' as OpCo, * FROM [ODS].[LP_MAC_ufn_UserFieldNames]
UNION
SELECT 'RTW' as OpCo, * FROM [ODS].[LP_RTW_ufn_UserFieldNames]
UNION
SELECT 'PBC' as OpCo, * FROM [ODS].[LP_PBC_ufn_UserFieldNames]
UNION
SELECT 'SWR' as OpCo, * FROM [ODS].[LP_SWR_ufn_UserFieldNames]
